hero.name: Tyrese Mosley
hero.subtitle: Information Science student building real tech — on track for a career in cybersecurity.

about.heading: Who I am
about.bio: I'm Tyrese Mosley, a student at the University of Pittsburgh majoring in Information Science and minoring in Communications, with a passion for learning technology that makes a difference. I love turning complex problems into clean, intuitive experiences. Additionally, I have a strong interest in cybersecurity, as I believe that protecting information and systems is crucial in today's digital landscape. I'm excited about exploring innovative ways to safeguard data and ensure a secure online environment for everyone.
about.journey: My journey began with a simple curiosity about how things work on the internet at a young age. That curiosity sparked my interest in exploring anything related to technology, which eventually led me to develop real tools for nonprofits in Philadelphia. This experience inspired me to become a cybersecurity analyst. Every project teaches me something new, and all the knowledge I gain in life brings me closer to the future I desire.
about.footer: Philadelphia, PA · Posse Scholar · Information Science

quote.verse: Yet what we suffer now is nothing compared to the glory he will reveal to us later.

projects.title: WLP Youth Tracker
projects.description: Internal student lifecycle tracking platform for a Philadelphia nonprofit. Replaces fragmented spreadsheets and Airtable with a single source of truth — tracking students from application through alumni engagement.

projects.title: WLP PTO Portal
projects.description: Internal PTO management system for nonprofit staff. Features request submission, manager approvals, team calendar with blackout dates, email notifications, and a GitHub-backed CMS.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: This site — built from scratch with Vite + React and plain CSS. Features a GitHub-backed CMS, PIN-protected admin panel, smooth scroll animations, and Intersection Observer-powered reveals.
